## Opaline FM v1.0.10

This release keeps the v1.0.9 synthesis behavior and makes DX21 voice transfer available from the desktop interface.

- Added the VOICE EXPORT button to send the current compatible voice to a connected DX21 over MIDI.
- Kept MIDI KEY TEST hidden from the normal release interface.
- Updated desktop, iOS, and AUv3 version metadata.

macOS packages are signed and notarized. Windows installers are currently unsigned.
